Title: Apple Business Manager + Intune ADE Enrollment Profiles
Description: Configure Apple Business Manager (ABM) Automated Device Enrollment for AFFG's 9 Apple endpoints (3 Mac Minis + 6 Apple Neo notebooks). Link ABM to Technijian's Intune tenant via MDM server token. Create the macOS enrollment profile: user-driven mode, Setup Assistant customization (skip Apple ID, Siri, Touch ID optional, Technijian branding), Entra ID join via Platform SSO. Register all 9 device hardware serials in ABM. Verify ADE readiness.

Title: Intune Compliance Policies for macOS
Description: Create Intune compliance policies for macOS endpoints: require FileVault encryption, Gatekeeper in Developer-ID-signed-only mode, XProtect active, firewall enabled, minimum macOS version, screen lock timeout (15 min), and passcode complexity. Configure non-compliance action: mark non-compliant after 1 day, block M365 access via Conditional Access integration.

Title: Intune Configuration Profiles for macOS
Description: Deploy Intune configuration profiles for the 9 Apple endpoints: FileVault silent enable with institutional key escrow, Gatekeeper strict, System Integrity Protection verified, macOS firewall rules, Software Update for macOS (monthly quality + quarterly feature), passcode complexity policies, and telemetry settings. Test profile application on one Mac Mini and one Apple Neo notebook before fleet deployment.

Title: Mac ABM Enrollment & Imaging (9 Apple Endpoints)
Description: Execute ABM-based enrollment for all 9 AFFG Apple endpoints (3 Mac Minis + 6 Apple Neo notebooks). Each device: factory reset (erase all content and settings), connect to internet, run Setup Assistant, verify automatic Intune enrollment via ADE, confirm Entra ID join via Platform SSO, validate all compliance profiles applied (FileVault active with key escrowed, Gatekeeper, firewall, OS up to date). Document device serial, Entra device ID, and compliance state.

Title: Endpoint Security Stack Deployment (9 macOS Endpoints)
Description: Deploy the full Technijian macOS endpoint security stack to all 9 Apple endpoints via Intune app deployment: CrowdStrike Falcon for Mac (EDR), Huntress macOS (Managed Detection), Cisco Umbrella macOS (DNS Filtering), ManageEngine Patch Management for macOS (PMMAC), ConnectWise ScreenConnect macOS agent. Verify agent check-in for each product on all 9 devices. Test CrowdStrike with EICAR, confirm Huntress 24/7 monitoring, validate PMMAC patching queue.

Title: MyAudit UAM+DLP Agent Deployment on 9 Macs
Description: Install and configure MyAudit UAM+DLP agent (macOS build) on all 9 Apple endpoints. Configure DLP policies: block USB/external storage writes, block local download of regulated data, block print-to-local, block clipboard copy to unmanaged apps, block screen capture. Verify 1-year retention policy. Validate detection accuracy with test scenarios. Document any macOS-specific coverage differences versus the Windows DLP baseline for the Phase 5 gap assessment.

Title: SSO/2FA Gateway Deployment on Managed Macs
Description: Deploy and configure Technijian SSO/2FA gateway (macOS client) on all 9 Apple endpoints for custodian bank portals (Schwab Advisor Services, Interactive Brokers) and non-M365 regulated systems. Verify MFA enforcement and session logging per Reg S-P 2024 amendments.

Title: Credential Manager Deployment on Managed Macs
Description: Deploy Technijian Credential Manager (macOS client) to all 9 Apple endpoints. Configure vault with Schwab, IBKR, and M365 credentials. Verify auto-fill and session tracking for regulated portals. Integrate with macOS Keychain where appropriate without weakening policy-enforced controls.

Title: Conditional Access Policy Suite
Description: Configure Entra ID Conditional Access policy suite for managed-Mac model: Policy 1 — Require Intune-compliant device for M365 access (Exchange, SharePoint, OneDrive, Teams) across macOS and iOS. Policy 2 — Block legacy authentication (IMAP, POP3, SMTP AUTH, Exchange ActiveSync). Policy 3 — Require MFA for all sign-ins. Apply to all 31 M365 users. Test personal-device blocking and legacy-auth rejection.

Title: CloudBrink ZTNA Tenant & Connector Setup
Description: Provision CloudBrink ZTNA tenant for AFFG. Deploy CloudBrink connector (edge appliance) integrated with AFFG network. Configure identity provider integration with Microsoft Entra ID for SSO. Define application resources: M365, Schwab Advisor Services, Interactive Brokers TWS, internal file shares. Reg S-P 248.30(a)(3); NIST AC-17, SC-7.

Title: CloudBrink Agent Deployment to 9 Managed Macs
Description: Deploy CloudBrink ZTNA agent (macOS build) to all 9 Apple endpoints via Intune app deployment (macOS package). Configure per-user ZTNA policies: device posture check (Intune compliance + FileVault + CrowdStrike/Huntress active) required per session. Verify agent auto-start, silent authentication via Entra SSO, and per-application micro-segmented access.

Title: CloudBrink Access Policies & Micro-Segmentation
Description: Configure CloudBrink per-application access policies: Schwab Advisor Services (HTTPS only), Interactive Brokers (TWS + IBKR Web), M365 suite, internal file shares. Enable per-session device posture verification. Configure session logging (user, device, app, duration, source IP). Block lateral movement between applications.

Title: Schwab & IBKR Access Migration (Office IP Whitelist to ZTNA)
Description: Coordinate with Schwab Advisor Services and Interactive Brokers to transition custodian access from AFFG's existing office-IP whitelist to CloudBrink ZTNA-based access. Submit updated access configurations to each custodian, validate ZTNA-routed connections from multiple network locations (office, home, travel) on the new Macs, and confirm the legacy office-IP entries can be removed from each custodian's allowlist after cutover.

Title: Intune MDM Enrollment for Company Phones (9 Devices)
Description: Enroll all 9 AFFG company phones in Microsoft Intune MDM. Configure enrollment profiles: require encryption, PIN/biometric, minimum OS version, jailbreak/root detection. Verify each phone shows compliant in Intune portal. Included in M365 E3 — no additional license cost.

Title: Intune App Protection (MAM) Policies for Mobile
Description: Create and deploy Intune App Protection Policies for Outlook, OneDrive, Teams, and Edge on company phones. Block: copy/paste to personal apps, save-as to personal storage, screenshots of corporate content. Require: PIN/biometric for corporate apps. Auto-wipe: on jailbreak detection or 30 days offline. Test containerization on pilot device.

Title: Mobile Remote Wipe & Termination Procedures
Description: Configure selective wipe (corporate data only) and full wipe (factory reset) capabilities for all 9 company phones. Document the termination procedure: HR notifies Technijian, Technijian executes selective or full wipe within 1 hour, wipe confirmation logged. Test wipe on pilot device. Configure auto-wipe triggers for jailbreak and extended offline.

Title: User Data Migration & Legacy Device Offboarding
Description: Migrate user data, application settings, browser bookmarks, and Outlook profiles from each user's existing work device to the new managed Mac (Mac Mini or Apple Neo notebook). After migration validation: securely offboard the 4 legacy devices in scope — MACBOOK-PRO-4 (MacBook Pro), KIKI (Surface Pro 8), LEON (Lenovo V15 G2 IJL), and MAGGIE (Surface Pro 8). Offboarding: remove from Intune, remove from Entra, full-disk wipe per NIST SP 800-88 Clear/Purge, document chain-of-custody. Verify Outlook mail/calendar, OneDrive sync, Teams sign-in, browser bookmarks, and line-of-business application access on each new Mac.

Title: User Training — macOS Managed Device Workflow
Description: Conduct training sessions for all 9 AFFG users on the macOS managed-device workflow: Mac sign-in with Entra ID + MFA via Platform SSO, CloudBrink ZTNA auto-connect, Schwab/IBKR access via CloudBrink, MyAudit DLP restrictions (no USB/download/print), phone MDM enrollment and app containerization, what to do if device is lost/stolen. Produce a quick-reference guide for the macOS managed-device workflow.

Title: Pilot Operation Window (2–3 Users on Managed Macs)
Description: Run a 2-week pilot operation window with 2–3 designated AFFG users operating on the new managed Macs while the remaining users continue on their existing devices. Pilot users exercise all workflows (M365, Schwab, IBKR, internal shares) across multiple network locations. Monitor CloudBrink connectivity, DLP events, Conditional Access blocks, and user friction. Resolve issues before full fleet cutover.

Title: Legacy Office-IP Whitelist Decommission
Description: After all 9 users have cut over to managed Macs and ZTNA-based custodian access is validated: coordinate with Schwab Advisor Services and Interactive Brokers to remove AFFG's office-IP entries from each custodian's allowlist. Verify that custodian access now requires a posture-verified managed Mac via CloudBrink. Document the final-state access architecture for the compliance binder.

Title: Monitoring Expansion — Device Fleet & CloudBrink
Description: Expand the existing monthly compliance assessment to include: Intune device fleet monitoring (all 9 Apple endpoints + 9 phones enrolled, encrypted, patched, checking in), CloudBrink agent status (active, posture checks passing, unauthorized access attempts), Conditional Access sign-in analytics. Update the monthly compliance dashboard PDF template to reflect the all-Apple managed-device architecture.

Title: Monthly Mobile Device Audit Configuration
Description: Configure the monthly mobile device audit: enrolled device count vs. headcount, compliance violations, wipe history, jailbreak detection events. Fold into existing Technijian assessment cadence per FINRA 3110(c) and 3120. Produce audit evidence template for regulator presentation.

Title: End-to-End Security Validation
Description: End-to-end validation of the managed-Mac control stack: attempt M365 access from personal device (should block), attempt USB data exfiltration on Mac (MyAudit should block), attempt legacy auth (should block), attempt CloudBrink bypass (should fail), attempt access with non-compliant Mac (should block). Document results for compliance binder.

Title: Post-Deployment Compliance Gap Assessment
Description: Conduct a gap assessment verifying that every citation in the Control-to-Citation Map (Reg S-P, FINRA 3110, FINRA 4370, SEC 17a-4, NIST 800-53) is met by the deployed macOS managed-device architecture. Compare deployed controls against the SOW Section 3 commitments. Document any macOS-specific residual gaps (particularly MyAudit DLP coverage differences vs. Windows baseline) and remediation ownership. Store evidence in the compliance binder.

Title: Compliance Documentation Suite
Description: Produce the compliance documentation suite aligned with the macOS managed-device architecture: Incident Response Plan (IRP) referencing managed Apple endpoints + CloudBrink, Business Continuity / Disaster Recovery disclosure, Service Provider Oversight (including CloudBrink as an assessed vendor), supervisory audit-trail architecture (Mac endpoint + CloudBrink + Intune model). Cover Reg S-P 2024, FINRA 3110/4370, SEC 17a-4, NIST SP 800-53 Rev 5.

Title: Schedule A Amendment — Consolidate to 9 macOS Endpoints + Add Managed Control Services
Description: Draft Schedule A amendment to MSA-AFFG-2026: (a) replace the Windows endpoint security pricing (PMW $4) with the macOS endpoint security pricing (PMMAC $11) and consolidate the stack from 16 Windows-priced desktops to 9 macOS-priced endpoints aligned to the 3 Mac Minis + 6 Apple Neo notebooks (-$122.50/mo net), (b) add the managed-device control services — MyAudit UAM+DLP (AMDLP1Y) × 9, SSO/2FA (SSO-2FA) × 9, Credential Manager (CRM) × 9 (+$1,125.90/mo). Net monthly change: +$1,003.40/mo (from signed $2,794.50/mo to $3,797.90/mo). Intune for Macs and phones included in M365 E3. CloudBrink subscription AFFG-procured.
